surface_verification.justification: small-complexity BUG. The DELETE /api/projects/:id route is touched (Backend-affects-Frontend), but the full observable outcome is proven end-to-end WITHOUT a browser: an in-process HTTP-surface integration test drives the real Hono route -> real cascadeDeleteProjectTasks -> real SdkSessionsStore and then GET /api/projects against the real ProjectManager.getAll() synthesis, asserting the project row AND its tasks are gone and NO synthesized 'Unassigned' row remains; a companion in-process integration test pins the same against the real domain objects incl. the 'other-project + genuinely-unassigned tasks untouched' case; and ProjectsPage.test.tsx mounts the real page to assert the delete-confirm task-count warning. No browser-only behavior — delete -> useDeleteProject invalidates the projects + tasks queries -> standard TanStack re-render. Phase matrix does not mandate a live browser E2E at small.

behaviors.behavior: Deleting a project cascade-removes every task whose projectId matches (store rows)
behaviors.evidence: cascade-delete-project-tasks.test.ts 'removes exactly the matching tasks...' PASSED; route + HTTP integration confirm the wiring

behaviors.behavior: Cascade clears each removed task's scrollback + snapshot side-files (best-effort)
behaviors.evidence: cascade-delete-project-tasks.test.ts asserts scrollback + snapshot callbacks fire once per removed task

behaviors.behavior: Cascade is a no-op (returns 0, no cleanup) when the project has no tasks
behaviors.evidence: cascade-delete-project-tasks.test.ts 'returns 0 and performs no cleanup when nothing matches' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Cascade persists the removal so it survives a store reload
behaviors.evidence: cascade-delete-project-tasks.test.ts 'persists the removal so it survives a reload' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Cascade is best-effort: a throwing cleanup callback neither rejects nor aborts the delete
behaviors.evidence: cascade-delete-project-tasks.test.ts 'is best-effort: a throwing cleanup callback...' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Cascade leaves other projects' tasks and genuinely-unassigned tasks untouched
behaviors.evidence: project-delete-unassigned.integration.test.ts 'the cascade leaves genuinely-unassigned tasks (and other projects' tasks) untouched' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: DELETE /api/projects/:id returns {ok,deletedTaskCount} and only cascades on success (unknown id -> 404, no cascade)
behaviors.evidence: projects.test.ts two new DELETE cascade tests PASSED; HTTP integration asserts {ok:true,deletedTaskCount:2}

behaviors.behavior: After project delete, GET /api/projects synthesizes NO Unassigned row for the removed tasks (end-to-end, real domain objects)
behaviors.evidence: project-delete-unassigned.integration.test.ts (real ProjectManager.getAll synthesis + real store) HTTP case asserts data has no 'unassigned' row and length 0 PASSED

behaviors.behavior: The delete confirm dialog warns how many tasks will be removed (>0) and omits the warning at 0 tasks
behaviors.evidence: ProjectsPage.test.tsx two new delete-confirm tests PASSED (2 tasks -> '2 tasks belonging...'; 0 tasks -> no 'belonging to this project')
